languages.text: "Жизнь есть долг, не только лишь право. Человек должен жить, пока способен приносить пользу Империуму".
"Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."
languages.original_text: "Жизнь есть долг, не только лишь право. Человек должен жить, пока способен приносить пользу Империуму".

traits.locale_text: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."
"Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."
"Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."

languages.text: "Das Leben ist eine Pflicht, nicht nur ein Recht. Eine Person muss lange genug leben, um dem Imperium von Vorteil zu sein."
languages.original_text: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: "Das Leben ist eine Pflicht, nicht nur ein Recht. Eine Person muss lange genug leben, um dem Imperium von Vorteil zu sein."

languages.text: « La vie n'est pas un simple droit, c'est aussi un devoir. Tout individu doit vivre aussi longtemps que possible pour servir l'Imperium. »
languages.original_text: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: « La vie n'est pas un simple droit, c'est aussi un devoir. Tout individu doit vivre aussi longtemps que possible pour servir l'Imperium. »

languages.text: “生命不仅是一种权利，更是一种职责。只要还能为帝国带来价值，一个人就必须继续活下去。”
languages.original_text: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: “生命不仅是一种权利，更是一种职责。只要还能为帝国带来价值，一个人就必须继续活下去。”

languages.text: «La vida es un deber, no un derecho. Una persona debe vivir en la medida en la que resulte útil para el Imperium».
languages.original_text: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: «La vida es un deber, no un derecho. Una persona debe vivir en la medida en la que resulte útil para el Imperium».

languages.text: 「人生は義務であり、単なる権利ではない。人間は、人類の役に立つことができる限り生きなければならない」。
languages.original_text: "Life is a duty, not just a right. Man must live as long as he is able to be of use to mankind".

languages.text: "Yaşamak sadece bir hak değil, bir vazifedir. İnsan, İmparatorluk'a fayda sağlayabildiği sürece yaşamalıdır."
languages.original_text: "Life is a duty, not merely a right. A person must live as long as they are able to bring benefit to the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: "Yaşamak sadece bir hak değil, bir vazifedir. İnsan, İmparatorluk'a fayda sağlayabildiği sürece yaşamalıdır."
